---
name: Support
about: Ask for help using the CodeX Club website
title: ''
labels: support
---

**What help do you need?**
Describe the issue you're encountering when using the CodeX website (include page URL or API endpoint).

**Steps to reproduce / context**
Provide steps, environment (local or deployed), and any sample data needed to reproduce the problem.

**What have you tried so far?**
List any steps you've already taken to resolve the issue.

**Additional info**
Browser, OS, user role, and screenshots if available.
